source_text: To use the SF-(X)sTD-DFT method[17] with a high-spin reference. First-SF-state-to-SF- state transitions are computed as well. Use the -spin option to get < S ^ { 2 } > of spin-flip states.

spans.content: To use the SF-(X)sTD-DFT method[17] with a high-spin reference. First-SF-state-to-SF-
state transitions are computed as well. Use the -spin option to get
of spin-flip
states.

protected_source_text: To use the SF-(X)sTD-DFT method[17] with a high-spin reference. First-SF-state-to-SF- state transitions are computed as well. Use the -spin option to get [[FORMULA_1]] of spin-flip states.
protected_translated_text: 要使用SF-(X)sTD-DFT方法[17]配合高自旋参考态。同时计算第一SF态到SF态的跃迁。使用-spin选项获取自旋翻转态的[[FORMULA_1]]。
translated_text: 要使用SF-(X)sTD-DFT方法[17]配合高自旋参考态。同时计算第一SF态到SF态的跃迁。使用-spin选项获取自旋翻转态的< S ^ { 2 } >。

spans.content: -nto <#state>

source_text: To compute natural transition orbitals for the #state first states. All NTOs are com- puted in molden files where the orbital energy parameter is in fact the weight of this pair of NTOs. A jmol.spt script file may be used with jmol to generate all NTOs pictures. Then, one can easily visualized them by opening the NTOs.html file.

puted in molden files where the orbital energy parameter is in fact the weight of this pair
of NTOs. A jmol.spt script file may be used with jmol to generate all NTOs pictures.
Then, one can easily visualized them by opening the NTOs.html file.

source_text: With this option, doing a polarizability or an optical rotation calculation, it is pos- sible to use the RespA approach[21] to compute natural response orbitals as well as chemical fragment responses for convenient elucidation of structure–(optical)property relationships. In this case, the number of states does not need to be specified. To com- pute chemical fragment responses, a file called ”fragments” needs to be specified and its content is:

spans.content: -rw

source_text: Saving some memory by writing on the disk large temporary files when running a re- stricted calculation.

stricted calculation.

protected_source_text: Saving some memory by writing on the disk large temporary files when running a re- stricted calculation.
protected_translated_text: 通过将大型临时文件写入磁盘来节省内存，在运行受限计算时。

spans.content: -dual

source_text: To use the dual threshold method[22] for restricted calculations (implying the -rw op- tion). With this option, two energy thresholds are used: one for the inner shell specified by the -e <Ethr> option and one for the outer shell specified in a file called ”dual”:

spans.content: To use the dual threshold method[22] for restricted calculations (implying the -rw op-
tion). With this option, two energy thresholds are used: one for the inner shell specified
by the -e <Ethr> option and one for the outer shell specified in a file called ”dual”:
